messages.content: translate "Historically, RRR cuts tend to follow one another once a monetary easing cycle starts" to chinese
历史上，一旦货币宽松周期开始，RRR 调整往往会接连进行。
translate "China’s national property sales remain subdued" to chinese
中国全国房地产销售仍然保持冷淡。
房地产销售价值 (fáng dìchǎn xiāoshòu jiàzhí)
translate “housing sales value y-o-y (YTD)” to chinese
房地产销售价值同比增长（年初至今）（fáng dìchǎn xiāoshòu jiàzhí tóngbǐ zēngzhǎng (niánchū zhì jīn)）
translate “housing sales gross floor area y-o-y (YTD)” to chinese
房地产销售建筑面积同比增长（年初至今）（fáng dìchǎn xiāoshòu jiànzhù miànjī tóngbǐ zēngzhǎng (niánchū zhì jīn)）
translate “2024e consensus implied earnings growth” to chinese
2024年预估共识所暗示的盈利增长 (2024 nián yùgū gòngshí suǒ ànshì de yínglì zēngzhǎng)
translate "Earnings growth forecast has become more reasonable after GDP downgrade" to chinese
在国内生产总值降级后，盈利增长预测变得更加合理。 (Zài guó nèi shēng chǎn zǒng zhí jiàng jí hòu, yíng lì zēng zhǎng yù cè biàn dé gèng jiā hé lǐ)
translate "traditional debt-driven investments or oversized real estate stimulus" to chinese
传统的债务驱动投资或过度的房地产刺激 (chuántǒng de zhàiwù qūdòng tóuzī huò guòdù de fángdìchǎn cìjī)
